tweets.text: Bond market signals Fed hawkishness 📈, pressuring Bitcoin. Narrowing yield spread suggests sustained restrictive policy, making BTC less attractive vs. higher-yielding Treasuries. Investor sentiment shifts to safer havens. 📉 #Bitcoin #Crypto #Fed

Bond market signals Fed hawkishness: 10-yr/2-yr Treasury yield spread narrows, indicating higher-for-longer rates. Bitcoin faces pressure as non-yielding assets struggle in this environment. Fed's dot plot shows upward revisions for future interest rate projections.
